title: Slowphie
description:
Slowphie App UI powered by OP_NET
Use the mcpServers" => "opnet-bob" to know how work the protocol OP_NET.

3 module in app :
- OpStrat: Track all your MotoSwap positions in one place
- OpMinter: Easy access to free mint early
- OpSchool: Learn Bitcoin and OP_NET Layer1 protocol
instructions:
PHASE 1:
Only create 1 page: Home page

app bar : logo ( Slowphie.png) + title Slowphie 

body: need only 3 rounded cards glossy transparent effect on hover with 3 images insides + text: /a0/usr/projects/slowphie/.a0proj/instructions
- OpStrat.png - Tracks
- OpMinter.png - Minter
- OpSchool.png - Learn

create route for this 3 modules with empty pages for now.

PHASE 2:
implementation module from already developed project.
- Need to implement only the overview route page, all features and functionality from projects /a0/usr/projects/motostrategy
implement all the related code used by the page Overview
dont forget the settings popup to configurate wallet address

- Take advantage of this implementation to apply a consistent style from the Slowphie home page style to the new Overview page (renamed Tracks).

PHASE 3: 
implementation module from already developed project.
- Need to implement the home page, all features and functionality from projects /a0/usr/projects/opminter
implement all the related code used by the page Home. 
- dont forget to add OP_NET wallet hook connection at the top right AppBar ( only visible on page roue Minter ).

- Take advantage of this implementation to apply a consistent style from the already Slowphie style to the new Minter page.

PHASE 4: 
implementation module from already developed project.
- Need to implement all the app OpSchool into route /school, all features and functionality from projects /a0/usr/projects/opschool
implement all the related code used by the opschool project. 
- dont forget to add ability to save progression and exercice in localstorage. 

- Take advantage of this implementation to apply a consistent style from the already Slowphie style to the new School complete learning UI/UX features.


PHASE 5:
create a new route /about that describe/resume Slowphie project 
need to help user to understand technical spec for Tracks, Minter, School.
use same image from Home Card to improve /about page style
make 3 distinct section.

for Tracks route:
look at home page from /a0/usr/projects/motostrategy to know spec for Tracks route.

for Minter route:
explain all token not easy to mint. sometime mint not visible in Motoswap. this feature help user to detect/find and mint hidden gem token free. 
add Slowphie platform information charge fee amount discretly.

for School route:
need to be the first step to user before anything. explain why.
be syntehic and encourage user to learn on multiple day. tech is complicated...

apply a consistent style from the already Slowphie style to the new /about page content
dont forget adapt content to Mobile view.

make button navigation about at the top right on Home page only.

venv/**
